title: MemInW
parameters: wordPortNum	Integer expression representing the I/O Word.
description: Changes the current status of memory I/O output port group specified by the word port number to the specified output data.
see_also:
Returns the status of the specified memory I/O word port.

Each word port contains 16 memory I/O bits.

MemIn

MemOut

MemOutW

MemInW Function Example

Long word0

word0 = MemInW(0)
